calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Petitioner: consuelo Martinez, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Jayne Consuelo Chulim-Martinez and Isabel Nic-tcha Chulim-Martinez, was sworn and examined.
In open court, request for dispensing with notice to Minor's Parent is granted.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Jayne Consuelo Martinez and Isabel Nic-tcha Martinez.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-23-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: P. Van Steenberge.
Petitioner: Consuelo Matinez, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors, was sworn and examined.
Without compliance of the Publication requirement, Matter is oredered off-calendar.
